chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Customer
triplets.object: multiple addresses but only one primary per type

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: at least one Order Line Item

triplets.subject: Order Line Item
triplets.object: A single line within a Sales Order

triplets.subject: Order Line Item
triplets.object: Unit price at time of order

triplets.subject: Line item
triplets.object: Unit price at time of order

triplets.subject: Unit price
triplets.object: does not change with future price updates

triplets.subject: Return Policy
triplets.object: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund

entities_post_resolution.name: Product Category
entities_post_resolution.definition: Product_Category: a category in the product taxonomy used to classify products, identified by a unique integer CATEGORY_ID and described by CATEGORY_NAME, with optional hierarchical linkage via PARENT_CATEGORY_ID.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO |
| SKU | VARCHAR(50) | Stock Keeping Unit code | NO |
| PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO |
| CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO | | **Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment) | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CATEGORY_ID | INT | Unique category identifier | NO |
| CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO |
| PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES |

entities_post_resolution.name: Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line item is an entry in a sales order that references exactly one product, specifies the quantity and the unit price at the time of order, and computes the extended amount (quantity × unit price).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | **Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Date
entities_post_resolution.definition: Date on which an order was placed (represented by the ORDER_DATE column).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Unique order identifier | NO |
| CUST_ID | INT | Customer who placed order | NO |
| ORDER_DATE | DATE | Date order was placed | NO | | **Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | Key Attributes:
- Order date when transaction was initiated

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line item within a Sales Order that specifies a product, quantity, and unit price at the time of purchase, and references exactly one product as part of a specific order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Key Attributes:
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | Definition: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | Key Attributes:
- References exactly one Product | Key Attributes:
- Quantity of units ordered | Key Attributes:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | Key Attributes:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | Product Relationships:
- A Product appears on zero or more Order Line Items | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items | Business Rules:
- Must place at least one order to remain active

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Payment is a monetary transaction associated with exactly one Sales Order, identified by a unique Payment ID and including payment method, amount, confirmation timestamp, and status.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Payment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer)
- Payment amount
- Confirmation timestamp
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Product Name
entities_post_resolution.definition: Product display name: the human-readable name of the product as stored in the product table, used for presenting the product to users.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO |
| SKU | VARCHAR(50) | Stock Keeping Unit code | NO |
| PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO | | **Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: An individual shipment representing goods moved from a source warehouse to a destination address, linked to a single sales order and tracked by a status and tracking number.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Shipment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Source Warehouse
- Destination Customer Address
- Shipped timestamp
- Tracking number
- Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | **Business Rules**:
- Can only be created for confirmed orders with payment
- One order may have multiple partial shipments
- Delivery address must belong to the order's customer | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Sales Order is a business document representing a single purchase order placed by a customer, identified by a unique order ID and linked to exactly one customer.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Key Attributes:
- Unique Order ID | Key Attributes:
- References exactly one Customer | Key Attributes:
- Order date when transaction was initiated | Key Attributes:
- Total monetary value | Key Attributes:
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED | Key Attributes:
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | Business Rules:
- Cannot be shipped until payment is confirmed | Business Rules:
- Can only be cancelled if not yet shipped | Business Rules:
- Status changes are logged for audit purposes | **Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Payment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer)
- Payment amount
- Confirmation timestamp
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Shipment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Source Warehouse
- Destination Customer Address
- Shipped timestamp
- Tracking number
- Status: PREPAR

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master
entities_post_resolution.definition: A central database table representing the authoritative Customer Master records, identified by CUST_ID, used to store and reference core customer attributes across systems.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Customer Address is the physical address used for delivering shipments, typically linked to a customer in the order/shipping domain.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | KEY Attributes: - Unique Customer ID | KEY Attributes:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login) | KEY Attributes:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | KEY Attributes:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses
- Geographic region for tax calculation | KEY Attributes:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses
- Geographic region for tax calculation
- Active/inactive status | Business Rules:
- Must place at least one order to remain active | Business Rules:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | Business Rules:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | Key Attributes:
- References exactly one Customer | Customer Relationships:
- A Customer places zero or more Sales Ord

entities_post_resolution.name: Email Address (Login)
entities_post_resolution.definition: The customer's email address used as the login credential for authentication in the system.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CUST_ID | INT | Unique customer identifier | NO |
| FULL_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Customer's full name | NO |
| EMAIL | VARCHAR(150) | Unique email address for login | NO | | KEY Attributes:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)

entities_post_resolution.name: Unit Price At
entities_post_resolution.definition: Unit price per unit recorded at the time an order is placed (historical price used for line-item calculations).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Key Attributes:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | Key Attributes:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO |
| SKU | VARCHAR(50) | Stock Keeping Unit code | NO |
| PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO |
| CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO |
| UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | | **Business Rules**:
- Unit price is fixed and does not change with future price updates | Key Attributes:
- Unique SKU code
- Human-readable product name
- Unit price in base currency (EUR)

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: Return Policy is a policy that allows customers to return products within 30 days of purchase in exchange for a full refund.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: 7 Years After
entities_post_resolution.definition:
Business Rules:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Business Rules:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: Definition: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Definition: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase.

| TOTAL_AMT | DECIMAL(12,2) | Total order value | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Multiple Addresses But

entities_post_resolution.name: Multiple Partial Shipments
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Business Rules**:
- Can only be created for confirmed orders with payment
- One order may have multiple partial shipments
- Delivery address must belong to the order's customer

entities_post_resolution.name: Ordered

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Storage of core customer profile data, including identifiers, contact information, regional grouping, account creation timestamp, and activation status.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about products including identifiers, naming, category, pricing, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores hierarchical category information for products, including each category's name and a reference to its parent category to enable category trees.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores metadata for sales orders including customer reference, order timing, amounts, status, payment confirmation, delivery timing, and record creation timestamp.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores line-level details for each order, including which product was ordered, the quantity, unit price, and the line total amount.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about payments processed for customer orders, including the method, amount, status, and timestamps for when the payment was confirmed and created.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of shipments associated with orders, including where and when they were shipped, tracking information, and current shipment status.
